goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking' and 'area'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'ely' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 09:00' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should include free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking and area
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to ely and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 09:00 and should depart from cambridge
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
